overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a handheld lantern. The rider passes a stone wall, wooden lamp posts, and a campsite with a fire before continuing down the winding dirt path.

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a forest trail at night, holding a lantern to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the left side of the path
wooden post with lit lantern providing warm yellow light
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the trail
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
faint orange glow of a campfire visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character rides along a narrow forest trail at night, illuminated by a handheld lantern. A stone wall runs along the left side while tall pine trees create a dense canopy overhead, and the warm glow of a distant campfire becomes visible ahead.

events.description: approaching a campsite with visible fire light and wooden wagons ahead
passing by the campfire, increased warm illumination from the flames on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride forward through the campsite area, passing wagons and the fire

notable_agents.action: standing near the campfire and wagons, observing the rider passing by

entered.detail: wooden covered wagon with canvas top parked near the fire
rocky hillside rising steeply on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The rider approaches and passes through a campsite with a burning fire and wooden wagons on the left side of the trail. The warm firelight mixes with the lantern's glow as the character rides past stationary NPCs, with rocky terrain rising on the right.

events.description: passing an NPC standing on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: riding away from the campsite, continuing down the forest trail into the darkness

notable_agents.action: standing by the side of the trail watching the rider pass by

entered.detail: distant wooden lamp post visible ahead along the trail

segments.scene_description: Leaving the campsite behind, the rider continues down the winding forest trail. An NPC stands by the roadside as the character passes, with rocky terrain on the right and the campfire glow fading into the distance behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark forest trail that transitions from a secluded path into a flickering campsite before returning to the solitude of the woods. It begins with the rider moving past a stone wall under a dense canopy of pine trees, guided by the warm glow of a handheld lantern and a distant campfire. As the rider approaches the light, the scene opens into a campsite where the lantern's glow mixes with the bright flames of a burning fire and the silhouettes of wooden wagons. The camera then follows the character past stationary figures and rocky terrain, moving away from the warmth of the camp. Finally, the scene shifts back into the darkness of the winding trail as the campfire fades into the distance and the rider passes a lone figure standing by the roadside.
